description_long: This object is a highly abstracted and distorted representation of a jogger, with elongated, angular limbs and a twisted, dynamic form. The figure appears to be in mid-stride, with one leg extended forward and the other trailing behind, while the arms are stretched out in opposing directions, suggesting vigorous motion. The surface is predominantly glossy black with some brownish highlights, giving it a sleek, almost metallic appearance. The body is thin and stylized, lacking realistic anatomical detail, and the head is pointed and narrow, blending into the upper torso. There are no visible facial features, clothing details, or accessories, and the overall form is more sculptural than lifelike. The structure is open and airy, with significant negative space between the limbs and body.
description: A highly stylized, glossy black jogger figure with elongated limbs and a dynamic, abstract running pose. The form is angular, open, and lacks realistic anatomical or clothing details.
description_view_0: From this view, the jogger's elongated limbs and pointed head are prominent, with the arms and legs forming sharp, angular lines.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the stretched, thin torso and the dramatic extension of the limbs, highlighting the open spaces between them.
description_view_2: Here, the dynamic running posture is visible, with the head and one arm raised, and the legs splayed apart in mid-stride.
description_view_3: This angle shows the twisted, abstract form of the jogger, with the limbs and torso intersecting at sharp angles and the overall structure appearing airy and open.
attribute_clothing_type: none; the figure lacks discernible clothing details and appears as a stylized, abstract form.
attribute_footwear_type: none; no visible footwear or shoe details are present.
attribute_running_posture: The posture is highly abstract, with the body twisted, one leg extended forward, the other back, and arms stretched in opposite directions, suggesting a dynamic running motion.
